title: LIP01 - Badge
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%">
  <gds-card variant="neutral-02-outlined">
    <gds-list dividers="">
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 href="">
        <gds-flex width="100%" justify-content="space-between">
        <gds-text font="detail-m-book">New payment</gds-text>
        <gds-badge variant="notice">4</gds-badge>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 href="">
        <gds-flex width="100%" justify-content="space-between">
        <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Cancelled payment</gds-text>
        <gds-badge variant="negative">2</gds-badge>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 href="">
      <gds-flex width="100%" justify-content="space-between">
        <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Upcoming transactions</gds-text>
      <gds-badge variant="information">10</gds-badge>
      </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 href="">
        <gds-flex width="100%" justify-content="space-between">
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Messages</gds-text>
          <gds-badge variant="notice">6</gds-badge>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
    </gds-list>
  </gds-card>
</gds-div>
